params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: includeLinks
params.description: Whether to include _links in the response

params.name: includeAllUrls
params.description: Whether to include all remote URLs (fetch and push)

params.name: includeHidden
params.description: Whether to include hidden repositories

items.docs: Returns a list of Git repositories in the project. Each repository includes its ID, name, default branch, clone URL, and remote URL.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: sourceRef
params.description: Initial branch name for the repository

items.docs: Creates a new Git repository in the project. Optionally can initialize the repository with a README and specify its visibility. After creation, the repository is empty unless a source URL is provided.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: includeParent
params.description: Whether to include the parent repository (for forks)

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific Git repository, including its default branch, clone URL, and project association. The repositoryId can be either the GUID or the repository name.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

items.docs: Updates properties of a repository such as its name or default branch. Only the fields provided in the request body will be changed.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

items.docs: Permanently deletes a repository and all its contents. This action cannot be undone. The repository and all pull requests, branches, and history will be permanently removed.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: scopePath
params.description: Path to the folder or file to list

params.name: recursionLevel
params.description: How deep to recurse into subfolders

params.name: includeContentMetadata
params.description: Whether to include content metadata (size, encoding) for files

params.name: latestProcessedChange
params.description: Whether to include the latest commit that changed each item

params.name: download
params.description: Whether to return file content as a download

params.name: versionDescriptor.version
params.description: Branch, tag, or commit to retrieve items at

items.docs: Returns a list of items (files and folders) in the repository at a specified path and version. Use this to browse the repository tree and download file contents.

info.name: Azure DevOps List branches and refs

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: filter
params.description: Prefix filter for ref names (e.g., 'heads/' returns branches)

params.name: includeLinks
params.description: Whether to include _links

params.name: includeStatuses
params.description: Whether to include commit status information

params.name: includeMyBranches
params.description: Whether to prioritize branches created by the current user

params.name: latestStatusesOnly
params.description: Return only the latest status for each ref

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of refs to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paging

items.docs: Returns a list of refs (branches and tags) for a repository. Supports filtering by a prefix string (e.g., "heads/" for branches, "tags/" for tags).

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: searchCriteria.itemVersion.version
params.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA to start listing from

params.name: searchCriteria.author
params.description: Filter by commit author name or email

params.name: searchCriteria.fromDate
params.description: Return commits after this date

params.name: searchCriteria.toDate
params.description: Return commits before this date

params.name: searchCriteria.itemPath
params.description: Filter commits that touched this file or folder path

params.name: searchCriteria.$top
params.description: Maximum number of commits to return

params.name: searchCriteria.$skip
params.description: Number of commits to skip (for pagination)

items.docs: Returns a list of commits in a repository. Supports filtering by branch, author, date range, file path, and commit message text. Results are sorted by commit date (newest first by default).

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: searchCriteria.status
params.description: Filter pull requests by status

params.name: searchCriteria.targetRefName
params.description: Filter by target branch (e.g., refs/heads/main)

params.name: searchCriteria.sourceRefName
params.description: Filter by source branch

params.name: searchCriteria.creatorId
params.description: Filter pull requests by creator's user ID

params.name: searchCriteria.reviewerId
params.description: Filter pull requests by reviewer's user ID

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of pull requests to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of pull requests to skip (for pagination)

items.docs: Returns a list of pull requests in a repository. Supports filtering by status, target branch, source branch, creator, and reviewer.

info.name: Azure DevOps Create a pull request

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: supportsIterations
params.description: Whether the PR should support iterations (diff views)

items.docs: Creates a new pull request to merge changes from a source branch into a target branch. Supports specifying reviewers, work item links, labels, and whether to complete the PR automatically on all approvals.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a pull request

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: pullRequestId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pull request

params.name: maxCommentLength
params.description: Maximum character count in returned comments

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of items to skip in collections

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items in collections

params.name: includeCommits
params.description: Whether to include commit details

params.name: includeWorkItemRefs
params.description: Whether to include linked work item references

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific pull request, including its status, reviewers, commits, merge status, and associated work items.

info.name: Azure DevOps Update a pull request

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: pullRequestId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pull request to update

items.docs: Updates a pull request. Use this to change the title, description, status (abandon or complete), target branch, and auto-complete settings. To complete a PR, set status to 'completed' and provide a lastMergeSourceCommit.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get pull request threads

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: pullRequestId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pull request

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of threads to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of threads to skip

items.docs: Returns all comment threads on a pull request, including code review comments tied to specific file positions and general conversation threads.

info.name: Azure DevOps Add a pull request comment thread

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: pullRequestId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pull request

items.docs: Adds a new comment thread to a pull request. Threads can be general comments or code review comments tied to a specific file and line number.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of pushes to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of pushes to skip

params.name: searchCriteria.fromDate
params.description: Return pushes from after this date

params.name: searchCriteria.toDate
params.description: Return pushes before this date

params.name: searchCriteria.refName
params.description: Filter by branch or ref name

params.name: searchCriteria.pusherId
params.description: Filter pushes by user who pushed

items.docs: Returns a list of pushes in a repository. Each push contains references to the commits pushed and the branch or tag updated. Supports filtering by date range and branch.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: GUID or name of the repository

items.docs: Creates a new push to the repository. This can be used to create commits, update branches, and modify repository contents programmatically. Requires specifying the ref updates and commits with file changes.
